mapper.select: select invoice_number, fee_id, invoice_code, invoice_amount, tax_amount, invoice_date, invoice_type, tax_rate, seller_name, seller_tax_id, invoice_status, check_code, remark, create_time, update_time from t_env_fee_invoices where fee_id = #{feeId}

select invoice_number, fee_id, invoice_code, invoice_amount, tax_amount, invoice_date, invoice_type, tax_rate, seller_name, seller_tax_id, invoice_status, check_code, remark, create_time, update_time from t_env_fee_invoices where invoice_number = #{invoiceNumber}
select count(*) from t_env_fee_invoices where invoice_number = #{invoiceNumber}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_env_fee_invoices
invoice_number, fee_id, invoice_code, invoice_amount, tax_amount, invoice_date, invoice_type, tax_rate, seller_name, seller_tax_id, invoice_status, check_code, remark,
#{invoiceNumber}, #{feeId}, #{invoiceCode}, #{invoiceAmount}, #{taxAmount}, #{invoiceDate}, #{invoiceType}, #{taxRate}, #{sellerName}, #{sellerTaxId}, #{invoiceStatus}, #{checkCode}, #{remark},
